mapper.insert: INSERT INTO csrv_header ( id, doc_no, company, receiving_store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, branch, supplier_do_no, delivery_date, remark, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{docNo}, #{company}, #{receivingStore}, #{supplierCode}, #{supplierContract}, #{branch}, #{supplierDoNo}, #{deliveryDate}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdMethod}, #{referenceNo}, #{releasedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO csrv_detail (id, csrv_id, item_code, available_qty, request_qty, receiving_qty) VALUES (#{id}, #{csrvId}, #{itemCode}, #{availableQty}, #{requestQty}, #{receivingQty})
mapper.select: SELECT id, doc_no, company, receiving_store, supplier_code, supplier_contract, branch, supplier_do_no, delivery_date, remark, status, created_by, created_method, reference_no, released_at, created_at, updated_at FROM csrv_header WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT h.id, h.doc_no, h.company, h.receiving_store, h.supplier_code, h.supplier_contract, h.branch, h.supplier_do_no, h.delivery_date, h.remark, h.status, h.created_by, h.created_method, h.reference_no, h.released_at, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM csrv_header h LEFT JOIN csrv_detail d ON d.csrv_id = h.id WHERE (#{company} IS NULL OR h.company = #{company}) AND (#{receivingStore} IS NULL OR h.receiving_store = #{receivingStore}) AND (#{supplierCode} IS NULL OR h.supplier_code = #{supplierCode}) AND (#{supplierContract} IS NULL OR h.supplier_contract = #{supplierContract}) AND (#{branch} IS NULL OR h.branch = #{branch}) AND (#{createdMethod} IS NULL OR h.created_method = #{createdMethod}) AND (#{referenceNo} IS NULL OR h.reference_no = #{referenceNo}) AND (#{itemCode} IS NULL OR d.item_code = #{itemCode}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR h.status = #{status}) ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
SELECT id, csrv_id, item_code, available_qty, request_qty, receiving_qty FROM csrv_detail WHERE csrv_id = #{csrvId} ORDER BY item_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE csrv_header SET status = #{status}, released_at = #{releasedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
